escalation.rationale: Iran war continues on day 76 with US-Israeli strikes ongoing, Saudi Arabia revealed to have conducted covert strikes on Iran, and ceasefire talks showing limited progress despite VP Vance's optimism.

ticker_items: Iran war day 76: Vance claims progress in talks
Saudi Arabia launched covert strikes on Iran during conflict
380 killed in Lebanon since April 17 ceasefire began
Oil spills detected near Strait of Hormuz from strikes
Trump begins China visit amid rising regional tensions

new_entrant.text: Saudi Arabia revealed to have covertly launched strikes on Iran during the ongoing regional war.

eastern_europe.description: Russian drone attack left nine-month-old baby girl fighting for life with leg blown off.

middle_east.description: Israeli forces conducted brutal bombardment killing at least 87 people since Friday.
US Apache and Seahawk helicopters sank half dozen Iranian small boats while clearing threats.

middle_east.text: Tehran's 14-point peace proposal has no alternative for resolving the U.S.-Iran conflict
middle_east.speaker: Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf
middle_east.title: Iranian Parliament Speaker

middle_east.text: Progress is being made in talks with Iran
middle_east.speaker: J.D. Vance
middle_east.title: US Vice President

observers.description: Saudi Arabia revealed to have covertly launched strikes on Iran during the regional war, marking a significant escalation in the kingdom's direct involvement in the conflict against Tehran.
Qatar intensifying regional mediation efforts despite the Iran war bringing airstrikes and cutting off Doha's access to global oil markets, leveraging ties to both US and Iran.
President Trump begins visit to Beijing amid rising tensions, with Trump reportedly weaker and Xi stronger since their last summit, as US seeks to manage multiple global conflicts.

financial.notes: Iran war costs have spiraled to $29 billion as oil spills detected near Strait of Hormuz threaten global energy markets.

update_log.text: VP Vance claims progress in Iran talks as Trump begins China visit
Saudi Arabia revealed to have launched covert strikes on Iran during regional war
Israeli strikes kill 87 in Lebanon since Friday despite ceasefire
Oil spills detected near Strait of Hormuz from ongoing strikes on Iranian infrastructure
